Full depth per screener: what the daily digest doesn't show. Each block carries real backtest numbers, a data-confidence sizing scale (a guide, never a permission), an AI read of today's batch, and the 90-day tape.

How fresh is this? Full rebuild end-of-day after the close on the 2026-07-06 data, then refreshed hourly during US market hours (prices, intraday options-flow signals; the AI reads stay on the EOD batch). Stock & technical screeners update once a day (EOD), options-flow screeners (Intraday ~30 min) refresh during the session. Insider feeds are daily, 13F is quarterly. Each card shows its own refresh cadence and data date. Screeners are ordered highest data confidence first.

★ Cross-screener confluence

CONFLUENCE
🧠 Tickers flagged by 2 or more independent screeners within one day; validated combos ranked first, everything else is context.
Backtested combos first (May-2026 sweeps + pairs battery), then today's coherent overlaps. Trade-ready funnel: best_trades_today →
Validated & debunked combos — numbers, not vibes
ComboData confidenceBacktestRead
SMART_FLOW × UNUSUAL_V3FULL SIZEN=168 · DSR +4.78 · promoted VALID by the May-2026 adversarial batteryThe one stock+flow pair that survived everything. Cabled in best_trades.
Any 3+ VALID screeners within ±1 dayFULL SIZEWR 81.7% · Sharpe 2.68 · p_bonf < 0.0001 (N=126, bucket-level)The bucket edge: triple agreement among validated screeners beats solos by +5.8pp WR.
UNUSUAL_V3 × end-of-month (last 3 bd)FULL SIZESharpe +5.48 · p_bonf 0.0096 (STRICT_VALID calendar combo)Cabled ×1.5 in best_trades when a UV3 signal fires in the last 3 business days of the month.
BOTTOM × DEAD sectorHALF SIZEtrain Sharpe +2.73 → test +1.93, ROBUST OOS (sector-context combo)Contrarian: bottoms inside left-for-dead sectors. Cabled ×1.2 in best_trades.
PULLBACK × NEW_DOWN sectorHALF SIZEtrain Sharpe +2.84 → test +1.25, ROBUST OOS (sector-context combo)Cabled ×1.2 in best_trades.
BOTTOM × SMART_FLOWSTARTER · edge unproventhe 'magic combo' (Sharpe 6.17, N=71) was NOISE: DSR -1.33, temporal clusteringKept here as a warning. Do not size this overlap on the old headline numbers.

Generic confluence carries the bucket-level stats only (3+ VALID screeners: WR 81.7% at +20d). A pair NOT listed above has no proven pair-level edge - treat the overlap as attention, not size. New-screener pairs re-enter the battery as their history grows.

🎈 Blow-off top detector NEW

BLOWOFF_DETECTOR
🧠 Spots parabolic tops about to roll over on the top-sector winners — Greenwood-Shleifer-You 2-year rallies, Edwards-Magee parabolic, gap exhaustion, island reversals and LPPLS variance acceleration. Only the max-drawdown-backtested signals carry weight; the academic heuristics confirm. GO / NO GO on naked puts comes from the live Polygon options chain.
📅 live prices · last complete close 2026-07-06 · top sector winners + indices · 10 tickers · 3 backtest-validated · 0 high-conviction · 3 imminent · 4 island reversals · GO/NO GO via Polygon options chain (OI≥1000, spread≤8%, ratio implied/DD≤1.3)

Read
Top blow-off candidate today: TRV (score 5, target ~$325.41 (DD20d -4.3%)).

3 ticker(s) fire at least ONE Bonferroni-validated backtested signal (25y, 50,109 obs, p<0.001). 0 stack ≥3 points = high conviction.

Methodology: the backtest-validated signals measure max drawdown over 20d (not the mean forward return — masked by rebounds in a bull market). The academic heuristics (Greenwood-Shleifer-You, Edwards-Magee, gap, island, LPPLS) stay displayed for context but do not survive Bonferroni on their own — they only confirm.
How to read this
Backtest-validated signals (25 years, 91 tickers, 50,109 observations, p<0.001):
• Two-red parabolic (weight 3) — 2 red days after parabolic. DD 20d -11.55%, lift +20pp, N=302.
• Stoch cross<80 + parabolic (weight 2) — DD 20d -9.65%, N=148.
• Rally + red on volume (weight 2) — rally 10%+ then red day. DD 20d -7.23%, N=93.
• Shooting star / BB fail / Bearish engulf (weight 1) — DD 20d -3 to -5%.

Options decision = multi-factor composite 0-100 (IV Rank · IV-HV · term struct · skew 25Δ · implied/DD ratio · liquidity). Score ≥70 + liquidity OK → 🟢 GO ATM Put. Score 50-70 → 🟡 GO LIGHT OTM 25Δ. <50 or liquidity KO → 🔴 NO GO + reason.

Global composite REJECT on its own (mean forward return bull-biased). Individual signals VALID on the max-DD metric.
Filter

All Screeners · ranked by backtest quality · type in the search box or click a chip to filter

🧠 Sharpe 4.83 in screener_validity but adversarial-fragile (block bootstrap KO).
Construction
Unusual options sweep + next-day OI delta confirmation (OPENING vs CLOSING) + EMA8/21 structure + low-OI anomaly. Score includes OI Delta, premium $, signal persistence, EMA alignment.
Top picks: $XRT $QQQ
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayPatternTypeStrikePremiumOI verdictOI ΔPersistEMAStreakNet 20d
1XRT ↑64 Watch$87.51 -0.62%BULLISH SWEEPCALL87.5$374KOPENING188167STRONG33
2QQQ ↑50 Watch$721.93 +1.31%BULLISH SWEEPCALL721$1589KNOT_FOUND—79STRONG47
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Starts from the prior day's UNUSUAL signals, then checks T+1 OI Delta
  • OI Delta: OPENING (+25), LIKELY_OPENING (+15), CLOSING (-50), NEUTRAL (+5)
  • 20d flow persistence: net≥5 → +30, ≥3 → +20, ≥2 → +10, ≤-2 → -15; streak bonus ≥3
  • Multi-leg spread detected: -30; Low-OI anomaly: +15
  • EMA STRONG +10 / PULLBACK +5 / BROKEN -10; quality HIGH +5 / LOW -5 (min mcap $500M)
  • Archives only non-CLOSING signals AND score ≥ 50
Score
clamp(0,100, OI_delta + persistence + spread + low_oi + ema + quality). CLOSING dropped. LONG.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

HALF SIZEinsufficient data (5 resolved, need ≥20)
Last 90 days: 294 signals captured · 5 resolved at +20d · WR 100% · avg +200.0% · vs SPY +4.6%
Triple-barrier (TP=+3×ATR / SL=-2×ATR / max 20d): 292 closed · WR TB 100% · 0% expired
What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Liquid universe: market cap ≥ $2B, volume ≥ 500K
  • VP spread (IV Rank vs HV30) - weight 35%
  • Sinclair sector bias (Utilities +31% … Tech -8%) - weight 25%
  • Value factors (P/E, RoE, RoA, D/E, mcap) - weight 25%; IV Rank - weight 15%
  • Garbage-stock bonus (high P/E, low RoE) up to +15
Score
clamp(0,100, vp×0.35 + sector×0.25 + value×0.25 + ivr×0.15 + garbage_bonus). LONG (sell puts), top 30.

🧠 The Sinclair VRP edge: MID tertile Sharpe +2.34, OOS test +2.13 (ROBUST, decay 1.39).
Construction
Longs tickers in the MID tertile of the variance risk premium (IV vs realized): options priced coherently with realized vol, neither too cheap (LOW = market disbelief) nor too rich (HIGH = catalyst already priced).

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Reads the variance_premium_daily table on the latest day
  • Keeps only the MID tertile (OOS sweet spot: neither LOW cheap nor HIGH catalyst-priced)
  • Sorted by vrp_proxy ascending, top 30
Score
max(50, 100 − rank×50/n) within the MID tertile. LONG.

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • For each ticker on the latest options_daily_flow day
  • Trigger: put_volume ≥ 3.0× the 30d moving average of put_volume
  • AND put_volume ≥ 100 contracts
Score
min(100, put_ratio × 20) where put_ratio = put_volume / 30d average. LONG (contrarian: hedging = bottom near).

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filters: price > $5, avg volume > 500K, market cap > $100M
  • Excluded if pulled back > 25% below the 52-week high
  • Uptrend: 90d slope > +0.20%/day, 60d slope > +0.25%/day, 90d R² > 0.70, price > EMA50 and EMA200
  • Pullback in progress: 30d slope < +0.15%/day, 10d slope < +0.05%/day, RSI(14) between 40 and 65 (sweet spot 45-55)
  • Healthy pullback: 10d/30d volume < 0.80, ATR contracting, no down gaps, Fibonacci level 38/50/62%, <15% below 52w high
  • Recovery: higher lows, rising 5d volume, bullish RSI divergence
Score
Uptrend (max 30) + Pullback (max 25) + Healthy (max 25) + Recovery (max 30). Unified scale: ≥65 Signal · ≥80 Strong · ≥90 Very strong (below 65 = Watch). Archived if ≥50. LONG.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts
📊 Recent tracking (last 90 days, ticker by ticker)
HALF SIZEinsufficient data (0 resolved, need ≥20)
Last 90 days: 620 signals captured
Triple-barrier (TP=+3×ATR / SL=-2×ATR / max 20d): 430 closed · WR TB 50% · 0% expired
What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

Construction
Flags Stage 4 names (below declining MA30W) with deep 90d drawdown + washed-out RSI as contrarian basket candidates: the Weinstein backtest inverted, Stage 4 entries mean-revert +11.25% SPY-relative at 120d.

Data confidence FULL SIZE VVIX climax V3 STRICT_VALID, P(VIX spike) 11%->4% in 30d, wired prod (lib/vvix_climax_detector) Full methodology →
🧠 STRICT_VALID: P(VIX spike) drops 11%→4% in 30d when this fires.
Construction
VVIX percentile + VIX term structure (VIX3M/VIX) + FOMC proximity + weekend effect. Detects 'vol-of-vol' climax (sell-vol opportunities at the top of fear).
Top picks: $SPY
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayVerdictComposite
1SPY ↑62 Watch$749.01 +0.57%SELL VOL1.43
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Market-level signal archived under SPY (Sinclair composite)
  • VVIX: ≥90th pctile → SELL VOL (+2), ≤10th → BUY VOL (-2)
  • Term structure VIX3M/VIX < 1.0 contango → +1; VIX regime 13-19 sweet +1, >24 danger -1
  • Weekend (Friday) +0.5; FOMC 3d ahead +0.5; Hurst/timing optional
Score
sum of sub-scores (~-6 to +6). ≥3.5 STRONG SELL VOL … ≤-3.5 STRONG BUY VOL. Archived score = clamp(0,100,(total+6)/12×100).
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

🧠 V3 patch May 19: cut signal count ~54% (39→18 on today's data) by killing extended stocks.
Construction
Stocks with options volume > 5× mean(20d) + premium > $50K + Vol/OI > 5. V3 filters now applied at write time: keeps only calm (vol<1.5× avg) and non-extended (±5% from EMA20) tickers, drops LATE-timing chasing signals.

#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayPatternTypeStrikeDTEPremiumVol/OIIVDeltaTimingFlowOIToxicity
1CRDO ↑78● Signal$259.93 +7.45%BEARISH SWEEPPUT247.510$2874K97.80149.1%-0.31CONTRARIAN200.57

4FXI ↑52 Watch$32.42 +1.61%BULLISH SWEEPCALL3324$427K44.9026.5%0.40EARLY1560.22

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Per-contract filters: Vol/OI > 3.0×, volume > 500, premium > $100K, contract OI ≥ 10, chain OI ≥ 5000
  • Expiration 7-365 DTE; deep ITM excluded
  • Pattern: delta>0.7 → HEDGE, call → BULLISH SWEEP, put → BEARISH SWEEP
  • Timing: LATE (-15) if chasing a >3% move, EARLY (+10)
  • V3 hard filters (before archive): volume < 1.5× the 20d average, |price-EMA20| < 5%, timing ≠ LATE
Score
Vol/OI (max 30) + log premium (max 30) + OTM (max 20) + delta (max 20) + timing (-15/+10) + IV compression (IVRank<15 +15). Archived if ≥50.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts
📊 Recent tracking (last 90 days, ticker by ticker)

What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

Construction

🧠 Real edge but fragile - Sharpe 1.4 with WR 64%, hits 7/8 historical crashes when paired with SMART_FLOW (the 'magic combo' Sharpe 6.17).
Construction
Deep oversold (≥-40% from 52w high) with capitulation volume + reversal candle. Score combines drawdown depth, ATR contraction, volume spike, and proximity to 52w low. ATR-based stop 2.5×, target 3.0×, max hold 15 days.

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filters: price > $5, avg volume > 500K, market cap > $100M
  • Downtrend: 90d slope < -0.20%/day, 60d slope < -0.25%/day, accelerating decline
  • Oversold: RSI(14) < 30, price < -15% below EMA20, < -30% below EMA50, Bollinger %B < 0, <20% above 52w low
  • Capitulation: 10d/30d volume > 1.50, ATR ratio > 1.5, ≥7 red days out of 10, ≥2 down gaps, reversal bar
  • Signs of Strength: slope deceleration, higher lows, 1-5 day bounce off the low, bullish RSI divergence
  • Persistence bonus: signal seen ≥10 times in 15d = +20, ≥5 times = +10
Score
Downtrend (max 30) + Oversold (max 25) + Capitulation (max 45) + SOS (max 35) + Persistence (0/10/20). Unified scale: ≥65 Signal · ≥80 Strong · ≥90 Very strong (below 65 = Watch). Archived if ≥50. LONG.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

Data confidence HALF SIZE · Sharpe 0.73 Stocks-on-the-Move, walk-forward Sharpe 0.73 (+45.6% vs SPY); trend-quality factor, not a per-trade trigger Full methodology →
🧠 Modest standalone edge - walk-forward backtest Sharpe ~0.73 (+45.6% total vs SPY, DD -12.4%), monthly rebalance.
Construction
Andreas Clenow 'Stocks on the Move' (Trading Evolved ch.12). Score = annualized exponential-regression slope (90d) × R², filtered on price > MA100 and max recent gap < 15%. Buys only when SPY > MA200 (regime gate). ATR-based sizing (10 bps risk/position).

Construction
Tactical 5-day post-earnings continuation: scans for follow-through bars 1-5 days after surprise. Score from short-term momentum + relative volume.

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Recent earnings with EPS surprise ≥ 5.0%
  • Price ≥ $5, volume ≥ 500K, market cap ≥ $500M
  • Fixed 5-day hold
Score
min(100, surprise_pct × 4). LONG.

Triple-barrier (TP=+3×ATR / SL=-2×ATR / max 20d): 21 closed · WR TB 24% · 19% expired
What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

🧠 Built on 13 MARGINAL_INVERSE Bonferroni cells (+6 to +14% SPY at 60-120d after correlation breaks).
Construction
Counts intermarket correlation breaks (|z| >= 2 sigma over 7d) across major pairs from intermarket_corr_history; >= 2 broken pairs fires a contrarian BUY on SPY, severity scales with the count.

Post-Earnings Drift

PEADEODData: 2026-06-30
Live: PEAD base (3-month drift after positive surprise)
Today's best
●●● Very strong
1 signal ≥65 · 1 shown
Data confidence
HALF SIZE
sizing guide, not permission
90d tape
FULL SIZE OK
WR 61%
Refresh
EOD
Data confidence HALF SIZE doctrine 8-step: MARGINAL at h=5d (Sharpe 0.5-0.6), REJECT at h>=10d; 60d academic drift not reproduced Full methodology →
🧠 Academic edge real (Bernard & Thomas 1989) but my backtest doctrine 8-step says MARGINAL at h=5d only (Sharpe 0.5-0.6), REJECT at h≥10d.
Construction
Post-earnings continuation: positive EPS surprise + gap up + holds gap into 1-3 weeks. Score uses surprise magnitude, gap size, post-gap action, and analyst revision activity.
Top picks: $BB
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ daySurpriseConsistencyPost-earn ret
1BB ↑95●●● Very strong$11.52 +0.04%50.0%420.7%
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • POSITIVE direction (EPS beat), surprise ≥ 5.0%
  • Days since earnings in [1, 20]
  • Consistency (beats in the last 4 quarters) ≥ 2
  • Price ≥ $5, 20d avg volume ≥ 500K; final inclusion if score ≥ 45
Score
surprise (≥20 +40, ≥10 +30, ≥5 +20) + consistency (≥4 +25, ≥3 +15, ≥2 +8) + window (≤3d +20, ≤7 +15, ≤14 +10) + drift (>3% +15, >0 +10). Unified scale: ≥65 Signal · ≥80 Strong · ≥90 Very strong (below 65 = Watch). Archived if ≥45. LONG.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

🧠 Sharpe 3.41 - strong solo.
Construction
Large options block trades (>$200K premium, 1-10 DTE, OTM) on quiet stocks. Confirms next-day with OI delta to verify NEW position vs closing. Score weights total premium, vol/OI ratio, OI confirmation.

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Stealth institutional accumulation over 60d of OHLCV (optionable universe)
  • Block day: dollar-volume z-score ≥ 1.5σ vs the 60d baseline (excluding the last 5 days)
  • Stealth: low price impact = low |return| / σ_returns
  • Persistence: number of the last 5 days with dollar-volume z > 1.0; up-day bonus
Score
clamp(vol_z/4)×40 + stealth×30 + (persist_5d/5)×20 + (10 if up_day). Archived if ≥50. LONG.

🧠 From the 415-combo MA sweep: MA200-family crosses at 40d hold are the only robust family (WR ~58%, Sharpe ~1.0 at J+5 entry).
Construction
Full-universe daily scan: price crosses above EMA(200) daily, filtered by weekly close > weekly EMA(50), fired within the last 5 sessions. Informational holding 40 trading days.

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Polygon universe: ≥ 260d history, avg dollar-volume ≥ $200K, price ≥ $1
  • Entry: daily close crosses above the daily EMA(200)
  • Mandatory weekly filter: weekly close > weekly EMA(50)
  • Window: cross within the last 5 trading days
Score
60 + freshness×30 (= (5−bars since cross)/5) + 10 if weekly filter active, capped at 100. LONG.

What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filters: price > $3, 20d avg volume > 300K, market cap $200M-$50B
  • Mandatory gate: short interest ≥ 10% of float AND days-to-cover ≥ 3.0
  • Short interest: ≥30% float (+40), ≥20% (+30), ≥15% (+20)
  • Days to cover: ≥8d (+25), ≥5d (+15), ≥3d (+8)
  • Catalyst (not a falling knife): price > SMA50 AND 20d return > +5% (+20)
  • Volume building 10d/30d > 1.3 (+10), RSI(14) 40-70 not extended (+5)
Score
sum of components 0-100. Unified scale: ≥65 Signal · ≥80 Strong · ≥90 Very strong (below 65 = Watch). Archived if ≥45. LONG.

🧠 🎯 The project's first positive lead alpha on the SELECTION: the top-30 basket beats SPY net of costs OOS (block bootstrap p=0.005-0.035, hold 5/10/20d, train+test consistent).
Construction
Reproduces layer #5 of the @kerberos007 thread ('Volume leader screen from RUT-1000'): stocks ranked by relative volume (V/10d, V/30d, V/90d avg) × multi-horizon price momentum (1d/5d/20d/90d). Filters 20d momentum > 0 and price > 5. Score 0-100 = percentile rank of the leader score across the eligible universe.

Data confidence STARTER backtest_dalton_excess 2026-04 (500 tickers 2022-2026): raw excess = coin flip (WR 51%); WITH extreme-location + tail>=1.8xATR filter +3.18% @10d, N=74 only, no block bootstrap Full methodology →
🧠 Raw excess is a coin flip (WR 51%); WITH the extreme-location + tail filter it printed +3.18% @10d on N=74.
Construction
Market Profile on daily bars (Dalton, Mind Over Markets): rejection-tail bars >= 1.8x ATR formed at value-area extremes (location <= 30% or >= 70%), the only configuration that backtested positive.
Top picks: $GLRE
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ daySideTail ATRLoc %Kerberos trap
1GLRE ↑100●●● Very strong$16.48 +0.64%LOW2.0928.5%·
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Excess bar detected (wick ≥ 1.8×ATR14) formed in the last 3 bars
  • LONG direction: excess on the LOW side AND trade location ≤ 30%
  • Universe: last_close > 0, max 500 tickers
Score
tail_atr × 50 (tail_atr = wick / ATR14). LONG.

🧠 Same thin-sample caveat as DALTON plus the no-short-in-BEAR-macro house rule.
Construction
Mirror of DALTON: excess high bars at the top of the value area, rejection tail >= 1.8x ATR, location >= 70%.
Top picks: $PFBC
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ daySideTail ATRLoc %
1PFBC ↓94●●● Very strong$106.72 -0.41%HIGH1.8776.1%
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Excess bar detected (wick ≥ 1.8×ATR14) in the last 3 bars
  • SHORT direction: excess on the HIGH side AND trade location ≥ 70%
Score
tail_atr × 50 (tail_atr = wick / ATR14). SHORT.

Triple-barrier (TP=+3×ATR / SL=-2×ATR / max 20d): 17 closed · WR TB 53% · 12% expired
What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

Data confidence STARTER PEAD gap-up + weekly trigger, small N, mechanically sound but too early for a verdict Full methodology →
🧠 Promising hybrid - combines PEAD academic edge with weekly Minervini-style trigger.
Construction
Weekly red-candle pullback within first 4 weeks post-earnings gap, then weekly close above prior week's high. Identifies high-quality continuation entries on positive earnings reactions.
Top picks: $ARCT
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayGapVol ratioBars ago
1ARCT ↑94●●● Very strong$7.21 -0.92%6.2%4.610
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Opening gap on one of the last 3 bars: 5.0% ≤ gap < 10.0%
  • Volume confirmation: gap-day volume / 20d average > 1.5
  • Dollar-volume ≥ $50M
Score
gap_pct × 15 (not bounded 0-100 → shown here rescaled, top pick = 100). LONG.

Data confidence STARTER prod-cabled KVO+FORCE combo, paper KEPT WR 67% vs SKIPPED 46% over 60d; no formal Bonferroni verdict yet Full methodology →
🧠 Paper-trade KEPT WR 67% vs SKIPPED 46% (Δ+21 pts) over 60 days.
Construction
SMART_FLOW signals filtered by skipping any trade with KVO_SIGNAL_CROSS or FORCE_INDEX_FLIP active ±3 days. Volume rules act as a negative filter (combo OR-skip).
Top picks: $XRT
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayPatternTypeStrikePremiumOI verdictOI ΔPersistEMAStreakNet 20d
1XRT ↑64 Watch$87.51 -0.62%BULLISH SWEEPCALL87.5$374KOPENING188167STRONG33
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Reads SMART_FLOW signals (2-day lookback)
  • Negative filter: SKIP if KVO_SIGNAL_CROSS OR FORCE_INDEX_FLIP volume rule active ±3 trading days
  • T+1 OI Delta filter: SKIP if call_volume(T+1)/call_volume(T) < 0.50
  • Keeps only signals that pass both filters
Score
original SMART_FLOW score, unchanged (no re-scoring). LONG.

Fresh 52w high or pivot breakout after tight base contraction (ATR shrinking). Score uses breakout strength, volume confirmation, weekly trend, and SPY filter (require_spy_above_sma50).

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filters: price > $5, avg volume > 500K, market cap > $100M
  • FOMO momentum required: 5d perf ≥ +3.0% AND 4-week perf ≥ +8.0%
  • Confirmed breakout: close > 2% above resistance (60d high) + day volume > 1.5× the 20d average (CONFIRMED +20, else WEAK +5)
  • Regime gate: not archived if VIX > 20 (OOS decay -0.49 Sharpe at VIX 20-25)
Score
perf_5d×0.3 + perf_4w×0.3 + perf_13w×0.2 + return_1y×0.2 + breakout_points (+20/+5). Not bounded 0-100 → shown here rescaled (top pick = 100). LONG.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filters: price > $5, avg volume > 500K, market cap > $100M
  • Parabolic trend: 90d slope > +0.25%/day, acceleration (30d > 60d > 90d)
  • Over-extension: RSI(14) > 70, price > +15% above EMA20, > +30% above EMA50, Bollinger %B > 1.0
  • Exhaustion: volume divergence (price up, volume down), ATR ratio > 1.5, ≥7 green days out of 10, ≥2 up gaps
  • Signs of Weakness: 1-5 day rollover off the high, bearish RSI divergence
Score
Trend (max 30) + Extension (max 25) + Exhaustion (max 40) + SOW (max 35). Unified scale: ≥65 Signal · ≥80 Strong · ≥90 Very strong (below 65 = Watch). Archived if ≥50. SHORT.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts
📊 Recent tracking (last 90 days, ticker by ticker)

Construction
LightGBM cross-sectional momentum ranker over the full universe; weekly inference takes the top 50 by predicted forward excess return.

What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

Construction
Contrarian RSI(14) reversal: HARD GATE weekly RSI(14) < 30 on the last completed week (coded 2026-06-09), then daily RSI oversold/crossover + candlestick reversal + demethod zone scoring.

Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filters: price > $5, avg volume > 500K, market cap > $100M
  • HARD GATE: weekly RSI(14) < 30 on the last completed week (fail-closed, added 2026-06-09)
  • RSI oversold: RSI(14) ≤ 30 (+15), ≤ 20 extreme (+10), ≥4 days under 30 (+5)
  • Reversal candlestick (hammer/doji/piercing/engulfing) on T-0 to T-2
  • RSI crossover: RSI back above 30 today or yesterday
  • Demethod zone: swing-low cluster (3% tol) + proximity to EMA20 (<3% +5) or EMA50 (+3)
  • Volume spike ≥2.0× (+5) + VIX %B regime (BTFD_BOOST +15 to DANGER -10)
Score
RSI Oversold (max 30) + Candlestick (max 25) + Crossover (max 20) + Demethod+EMA (max 15) + Volume (max 10) + Regime (-10 to +15), bounded 0-100. Unified scale: ≥65 Signal · ≥80 Strong · ≥90 Very strong (below 65 = Watch). Archived if ≥50. LONG.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

Data confidence STARTER · edge unproven mega-session 2026-05-16 crypto battery: 0/16 signals survive adversarial validation post-spot-ETF 2024 Full methodology →
🧠 Niche but interesting since 2024 spot BTC ETF launches.
Construction
Tracks unusual flow on crypto-linked ETFs (BITO, IBIT, FBTC, ETHE, GBTC, etc.) - volume vs mean, premium %, OI delta. Score weights flow intensity + spot crypto correlation.
Top picks: $HUT $BITO $FBTC
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayRSIRS IBIT 20dRegime
1HUT ↑75● Signal$107.87 +11.05%41.23-12.3%neutral
2BITO ↑50 Watch$8.35 +0.07%44.00-0.5%neutral
3FBTC ↑50 Watch$53.55 +0.05%44.68-0.2%neutral
4IBIT ↑50 Watch$34.84 -0.09%44.550.0%neutral
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Fixed 12-ticker universe: spot ETFs (IBIT/FBTC/ETHE/BITO) + equity proxies (MSTR/COIN/MARA/RIOT/…)
  • Filters: price > $2, 21d median USD ADV > $5M
  • Uptrend gate: SMA50 > SMA200 AND price > SMA50
  • Pullback: price between -8% and +1% vs SMA20; RSI(14) 35-55; RS vs IBIT 20d > 0
Score
Uptrend (max 35) + Pullback (max 25) + RSI (max 20) + RS (max 10) + Volume (max 10) ± regime, bounded 0-100. Archived if ≥35. LONG.

Data confidence No backtest stats yet (N < 30 or not run) · starter size, discretionary read. Methodology & all-screeners comparison →
🧠 Narrative trading is hard to backtest but cheap to track.
Construction
Detects emerging investment themes (e.g. Robotics, Space, AI Agents, Quantum). Tickers are extracted via ETF holdings of qualifying theme ETFs. Signal status: EMERGING / BUILDING / ESTABLISHED / CROWDED.

What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

🧠 Coat-tailing whales has theoretical edge (slow-moving alpha) but data is stale 45-90 days.
Construction
Quarterly SEC 13F-HR filings from 20 top hedge funds via EDGAR. Whale Score: +20/NEW (cap 60), +10/INCREASED (cap 30), -5/CLOSED, -3/DECREASED. Stale 60-90 days by nature (quarterly).

Data confidence No backtest stats yet (N < 30 or not run) · starter size, discretionary read. Methodology & all-screeners comparison →
🧠 Catch-up trades work when sector momentum is real (not in EXHAUSTED phase).
Construction
Within LATE_CHASE / RIDING sectors, identifies the lagging individual stocks that haven't yet caught the sector move. Score = sector relative strength × stock under-performance.

EOD
Data confidence Starter · untested · no rigorous backtest yet, queued for the untested-screeners battery. Methodology →
🧠 Contrarian deep value, cheap on EV/EBIT operating earnings.
Construction
Tobias Carlisle's Acquirer's Multiple = Enterprise Value / operating earnings (EBIT). Universe is market cap > $200M, excludes Financial Services and Utilities (EV distorted), drops negative operating earnings. Ranks the universe by multiple ascending and surfaces the cheapest names (score 100 = cheapest of the day).
Top picks: $BZ $WRD $KROS
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayAcquirer's MultipleEVOperating EarningsMarket CapEV source

14RIGL ↑57 Watch$38.80 +0.21%4.04$0.51B$0.13B$0.55Byfinance

16USNA ↑50 Watch$21.66 +0.70%4.07$0.27B$0.07B$0.35Byfinance
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filter: market cap > $200M, excludes Financial Services & Utilities (EV distorted)
  • Acquirer's Multiple = Enterprise Value / operating earnings (EBIT, operating income)
  • Operating earnings from Polygon financials (operating_income / EBIT); EV from yfinance else proxy market cap + non-current liabilities
  • Drops negative operating earnings; ranks the universe by multiple ascending (cheapest first)
Score
score = inverse rank scaled 0-100 (cheapest of the day = 100). LONG (deep value selection).
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

Triple-barrier (TP=+3×ATR / SL=-2×ATR / max 20d): 18 closed · WR TB 56% · 0% expired
What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

Refresh
Intraday ~30 min
Data confidence Starter · untested · INSUFFICIENT N=17 (battery 2026-06-09), needs N>=30 resolved trades. Methodology →
🧠 Warning bell, not a short trigger.
Construction
Detects retail-driven euphoria: retail call volume spike, Reddit mention surge, parabolic price, no earnings catalyst. Score combines social attention z-score + call/put + price stretch.
Top picks: $CART $CAT $CF
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayTierCall vol/OIChg
1CART ↓100●●● Very strong$46.48 +1.53%FOMO1.012.1%
2CAT ↓100●●● Very strong$988.82 +2.62%FOMO1.04-2.8%
3CF ↓100●●● Very strong$110.05 -0.45%FOMO2.262.2%
4BKNG ↓100●●● Very strong$183.79 -0.42%EUPHORIA0.991.1%
5AEO ↓85●● Strong$16.17 -1.76%EUPHORIA0.85-4.8%
6ARE ↓85●● Strong$52.13 -0.86%EUPHORIA0.85-0.8%
7BSX ↓77● Signal$45.17 +0.07%EUPHORIA0.774.8%
8BXP ↓75● Signal$69.31 -0.01%EUPHORIA0.752.3%
9CCJ ↓74● Signal$99.72 +3.30%GREED0.74-0.9%
10BE ↓73● Signal$281.38 +3.87%GREED0.73-6.4%
11CELH ↓56 Watch$33.65 +1.46%GREED0.564.0%
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • call_volume / call_open_interest ratio (euphoria contrarian)
  • Tiers: ≥1.00 FOMO, ≥0.75 EUPHORIA, ≥0.50 GREED (scan threshold 0.50)
  • Filters: price > $10, options volume > 1000, total OI > 4000
Score
clamp(0,100, call_vol_oi_ratio × 100). SHORT (fade the retail crowd).

Data confidence Starter · untested · no rigorous backtest yet, queued for the untested-screeners battery. Methodology →
🧠 Information ratio modest but directionally honest.
Construction
SEC Form 4 cluster buys: 3+ insiders buying within 30 days, with C-suite or director rank weighted higher. Score uses cluster size, total $ value, insider rank, and recency.
Top picks: $CTM $FCBM $FISV
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayBuysCXOClusterAvg value
1CTM ↑60 Watch$0.69 -4.73%4✓✓$1K
2FCBM ↑60 Watch$12.92 +2.05%15✓✓$111K
3FISV ↑60 Watch$51.68 -1.24%6✓✓$287K
4FNWD ↑60 Watch$36.80 -0.05%6✓✓$1K
5KMX ↑60 Watch$50.63 -0.69%5✓✓$254K
6LILA ↑60 Watch$7.74 +1.57%6✓✓$5519K
7LOVE ↑60 Watch$17.50 +0.06%3✓✓$163K
8WBX ↑60 Watch$4.16 +22.35%4✓✓$1245K
9COE ↑50 Watch$16.10 -1.53%3✓·$8549K
10FTH ↑50 Watch$22.92 -3.13%4✓·$297K
11GOTU ↑50 Watch$1.77 +1.43%3✓·$243K
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • At least 1 insider buy on the ticker
  • Cluster if ≥ 3 unique insiders within a 14-day window
  • C-level detected if title is CEO/CFO/COO/CTO/President/Chairman
  • Average transaction-size tiers: ≥$200K or ≥$100K
Score
buy base (≥2 +15, 1 +5) + cluster +25 + C-level +20 + avg (≥200K +15, ≥100K +8), cap 60. LONG.

What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

Data confidence Starter · untested · INSUFFICIENT N=0 (battery 2026-06-09), needs N>=30 resolved trades. Methodology →
🧠 Useful as a rotation overlay, not a primary signal.
Construction
Top relative-strength tickers within bullish sectors. Score = relative strength vs SPY (20d) + sector breadth + cluster ranking.
Top picks: $AAT $AAMI $ABCL
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ daySectorRet 1mRet 3m
1AAT ↑82●● Strong$25.46 -0.18%Real Estate19.0%31.5%
2AAMI ↑76● Signal$72.66 -0.59%Financials9.2%52.1%
3ABCL ↑74● Signal$7.66 -5.55%Healthcare7.8%47.3%
4A ↑65● Signal$129.10 -1.21%Healthcare15.9%17.1%
5ABCB ↑56 Watch$90.35 +0.26%Financials4.9%15.6%
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filter: market cap > $300M
  • Step 1: bullish sectors = sector ETF (XLK/XLV/…) with 20d return > 0
  • Step 2: score the stocks in each bullish sector, top 10/sector
Score
Momentum 0-100 = 1M Ret (30%) + 3M Ret (30%) + RS vs SPY 3M (20%) + Volume Trend (20%), normalized components. ≥70 strong. LONG.

Bull/Bear Traps (Value Area)

TRAPEODData: 2026-07-02
Live: trap_screener.py (LONG leg = bear traps)
Today's best
● Signal
2 signals ≥65 · 5 shown
Data confidence
STARTER · untested
sizing guide, not permission
90d tape
FULL SIZE OK
WR 75%
Refresh
EOD
Data confidence Starter · untested · INSUFFICIENT N=0 (battery 2026-06-09), needs N>=30 resolved trades. Methodology →
🧠 Concept was intraday ES futures; the daily adaptation is unproven.
Construction
Kerberos Apr-2020 thesis adapted to daily bars: a close below VAL (fake breakdown) followed by a reclaim next day = bear trap, shorts trapped, LONG signal. Mirror logic above VAH for bull traps.
Top picks: $AMX $AVXL $ALV
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayTrap typeStopTarget POCATR
1AMX ↑65● Signal$25.90 +0.70%BEAR_TRAP25.6226.420.66
2AVXL ↑65● Signal$2.74 -0.72%BEAR_TRAP2.532.690.17
3ALV ↑60 Watch$117.48 +1.07%BEAR_TRAP114.78122.133.27
4AMLP ↑55 Watch$52.15 +0.17%BEAR_TRAP51.4052.740.78
5ASM ↑55 Watch$6.72 +2.28%BEAR_TRAP6.397.120.45
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • BEAR_TRAP (LONG): close[N-1] < VAL then close[N] > VAL (failed bearish breakout reclaimed)
  • fake_dist and reclaim_dist in [0.2, 2.0] ATR; total pct_move ≤ 12%
  • score ≥ 55 required
Score
50 base + volume_ratio (>1.5 +15) + fake_dist (>1.0 +10) + reclaim_dist (>0.5 +10) + rejection_wick (>0.5 +10) + cleanness (+5), bounded 0-100. LONG.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts
📊 Recent tracking (last 90 days, ticker by ticker)
FULL SIZE OKWR 75% · avg +5.8% · beats SPY -1.1% by +6.9 pts

What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

STARTER ONLY
WR 50%
Refresh
EOD
Data confidence Starter · untested · INSUFFICIENT N=0 (battery 2026-06-09), needs N>=30 resolved trades. Methodology →
🧠 Same caveat as TRAP, plus the house rule: never short in BEAR macro tier (contrarian regime).
Construction
Fake breakout above VAH followed by a close back inside the value area = bull trap, longs trapped, SHORT signal.
Top picks: $ACCO $ADPT $ASPN
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayTrap typeStopTarget POC
1ACCO ↓70● Signal$4.15 -1.19%BULL_TRAP4.393.98
2ADPT ↓65● Signal$21.31 +0.57%BULL_TRAP23.1016.91
3ASPN ↓65● Signal$5.64 +1.08%BULL_TRAP6.213.40
4AUB ↓60 Watch$42.37 +0.25%BULL_TRAP43.8139.07
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • BULL_TRAP (SHORT): close[N-1] > VAH then close[N] < VAH (failed bullish breakout rejected)
  • fake_dist and reclaim_dist in [0.2, 2.0] ATR; total pct_move ≤ 12%
  • score ≥ 55 required
Score
50 base + volume_ratio (>1.5 +15) + fake_dist (>1.0 +10) + reclaim_dist (>0.5 +10) + rejection_wick (>0.5 +10) + cleanness (+5), bounded 0-100. SHORT.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts
📊 Recent tracking (last 90 days, ticker by ticker)

Last 90 days: 84 signals captured · 26 resolved at +20d · WR 50% · avg -0.8% · vs SPY -1.6%
Triple-barrier (TP=+3×ATR / SL=-2×ATR / max 20d): 50 closed · WR TB 36% · 10% expired
What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.

sizing guide, not permission
Refresh
EOD
Data confidence Starter · untested · INSUFFICIENT N=1 (battery 2026-06-09), needs N>=30 resolved trades. Methodology →
🧠 Small sample (6) - too early.
Construction
Pre-earnings (3-14d to event) with straddle IV < expected move from Yang-Zhang HV20. Identifies when implied vol underprices realized expectation.
Top picks: $JPM $ASML
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ daySectionDTEExpectedPlay
1JPM ↑65● Signal$337.90 +1.03%PRE_IV_RAMP11—BUY CALL 30-45 DTE
2ASML ↑55 Watch$1829.05 +3.38%PRE_IV_RAMP12—BUY CALL 30-45 DTE
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Market cap ≥ $1B
  • PRE_IV_RAMP: earnings DTE 7-14d AND IV Rank < 50 (premium not yet expensive)
  • POST_PEAD: days_since earnings 0-5d
  • REVERSAL: earnings ≤ 2d AND pre-earnings drift ≥ 3%
Score
by section: PRE_IV_RAMP (DTE + IV rank + consistency + mcap, max 100), POST_PEAD (surprise + consistency + days + drift, max 100), REVERSAL (|drift| + DTE, max 60).

Live: IV_SKEW

sizing guide, not permission
90d tape
FULL SIZE OK
WR 54%
Refresh
EOD
Data confidence Starter · untested · INSUFFICIENT N=10 (battery 2026-06-09), needs N>=30 resolved trades. Methodology →
🧠 Per-ticker version of macro SKEW signal.
Construction
25-delta skew (put IV − call IV) spike vs 90d baseline. Bearish skew = hedging demand spike, contrarian read when stock is calm.
Top picks: $COST $MSTR
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayIV30IV rankSkew 25dPlaybook
1COST ↓91●●● Very strong$952.28 +0.06%77%75—SELL CALL/PUT (IV rich)
2MSTR ↑55 Watch$96.18 -4.55%66%1000.03BUY PREMIUM (IV cheap)
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Cross-section scan of the watchlist (large caps + ETFs)
  • Skew_Z = (skew_25d − basket median) / basket std
  • IV_Rich_Z = (IV_HV_spread − basket median) / basket std
  • Composite = IV_Rich_Z×1.0 + Skew_Z×0.5; archived if |Composite| ≥ 1.5
Score
int(|Composite| × 20). SHORT vol if Composite>0 (IV rich), LONG vol if <0.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

Data confidence Starter · untested · INSUFFICIENT N=3 (battery 2026-06-09), needs N>=30 resolved trades. Methodology →
🧠 Small sample (6).
Construction
Bearish IV skew bias: put IV >> call IV at extreme percentiles (>90th). Detects unusual put demand.
Top picks: $AVGO
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ daySkew ptsIV30IV rankVerdict
1AVGO ↑100●●● Very strong$382.08 +6.00%16.7468.7%97BEAR_SKEW_EXTREME
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • 25Δ skew (30 DTE target) > +5 vol points (puts overpriced)
  • Earnings in 0-7 days (catalyst near)
  • IV Rank > 60 (high premium = fear)
  • Verdict: skew>10pts + IVRank>80 EXTREME, skew>7pts HIGH, else MILD
Score
clamp(50,100, 50 + skew_25d_pts × 3). LONG (BTFD contrarian: fear overpriced).
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts
📊 Recent tracking (last 90 days, ticker by ticker)

HALF SIZE
WR 44%
Refresh
EOD
Data confidence Starter · untested · INSUFFICIENT N=25 (battery 2026-06-09), needs N>=30 resolved trades. Methodology →
🧠 Useful for vol traders, not direction traders.
Construction
IV30 − HV20 spread spike on individual tickers (z-score > 1.5σ on 90d). Detects unusual fear premium - candidates for premium selling.
Top picks: $COST
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayIV30HV30RatioZone
1COST ↓100●●● Very strong$952.28 +0.06%77%23%3.35EXTREME_FEAR
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • ATM IV30 / realized HV30 ratio (price ≥ $10, ≥35 days of closes)
  • Zones: ≥2.0 EXTREME_FEAR, ≥1.5 FEAR, ≥1.2 ELEVATED, 1.0-1.2 NORMAL, <1.0 COMPLACENT
  • Archives only FEAR and EXTREME_FEAR
Score
min(100, ratio × 40) where ratio = IV30/HV30. NEUTRAL.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts

Research-lab composite: IV rank + IV30/HV20 ratio + skew + term structure + Kerberos-style flow. Experimental scoring R1.
Top picks: $VXX
#TickerScoreSignalPrice · Δ dayIV30IV rankHV20Rule
1VXX ↓85●● Strong$21.64 -1.79%54%861%RULE_1
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Vol-decay basket (UVXY, VXX, SVXY, SDS, QID, SQQQ, FAZ, TZA)
  • Rule 1 (3 conditions required): IV30 < 100% AND IV Rank < 10 AND VIX3M/VIX > 1.0 (contango)
  • 2/3 conditions → inactive (score 55)
Score
if 3/3 active: min(100, 85 + max(0, 3−iv_rank)). NEUTRAL.
Performance — 90-day tape + 6-month cohorts
📊 Recent tracking (last 90 days, ticker by ticker)
STARTER ONLYWR 27% · avg -9.2% vs SPY -0.5% (-8.7 pts)
Last 90 days: 34 signals captured · 26 resolved at +20d · WR 27% · avg -9.2% · vs SPY -0.5%
Triple-barrier (TP=+3×ATR / SL=-2×ATR / max 20d): 27 closed · WR TB 26% · 0% expired
What this is: instead of forcing a fixed +20-day hold, triple-barrier simulates a realistic exit, take profit at +3×ATR, stop at -2×ATR, else time out at 20 days. So a name can read WIN here (target hit early) while its raw +20d return is still open or negative. It is the closer estimate of what you would actually have banked.
Does the strength predict? (resolved signals by tier, +20d)

ALTMANEOD⚠ Dormant · 2026-05-23 (28d)

Data confidence No backtest stats yet (N < 30 or not run) · starter size, discretionary read. Methodology & all-screeners comparison →
🧠 No formal validity verdict yet.
Construction
Standard screener - refer to source script for full logic.
Top picks:
No signals ≥ score 50 for this date.
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filter: market cap > $300M, excludes Financial Services & Utilities (model not applicable)
  • Altman Z = 1.2×(WC/TA) + 1.4×(RE/TA) + 3.3×(EBIT/TA) + 0.6×(MktCap/TL) + 1.0×(Rev/TA)
  • Financials from Polygon (else yfinance)
  • Output filter: keeps only Z < 2.5 (grey + distress)
Score
score = the Z-Score itself. Zones: Z>2.99 SAFE, 1.81-2.99 GREY, <1.81 DISTRESS, <1.0 critical. LONG (risk filter).

Standard screener - refer to source script for full logic.

No signals ≥ score 50 for this date.
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filter: price > $10 (shortable)
  • Analyst gate: recommendationMean ≥ 3.0 (Hold or worse)
  • Fundamental gate: EVA Proxy Score ≤ 40 (low quality)
  • EVA Proxy 0-100 = 5 blocks of 20 pts: Profitability, Growth, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Valuation
Score
score = EVA Proxy (0-100, lower = worse). Top 50 sorted ascending (worst first). SHORT.

Data confidence No backtest stats yet (N < 30 or not run) · starter size, discretionary read. Methodology & all-screeners comparison →
🧠 No formal validity verdict yet.
Construction
Standard screener - refer to source script for full logic.
Top picks:
No signals ≥ score 50 for this date.
Exact criteria & score formula
Conditions checked
  • Universe filters: price > $3, 20d avg volume > 200K, market cap > $50M
  • Per-bar metrics (last 5): relative volume vs SMA20, normalized spread, close position within the range
  • Bullish patterns: No Supply, Testing, Stopping Volume, Absorption, Falling Pressure, Failed Down Move
  • Bearish patterns: No Demand, Up-Thrust, Buying Climax, Effort To Rise Failed
  • 20-bar accumulation/distribution background + Relative Strength vs SPY 20d
Score
best-pattern priority (No Supply 3 → Buying Climax 6) + background alignment (+2/-1) + RS vs SPY alignment (+1). Top 40. LONG or SHORT depending on pattern.
Not included on this page (by design)
These Google-Sheet tabs are not per-ticker screeners, so they have no card here: ETF_RANKING (asset-class ranking), CPR_RANK (Camarilla pivot assist), SECTOR_STRENGTH / SECTOR_BREADTH / SECTOR_ROTATION (sector-level gauges, see the macro cockpit), SKEW_VELOCITY / VOLATILITY_DASHBOARD / VVIX market panel (market-level vol gauges, see the cockpit), STRUCTURAL_FLOWS (OpEx / quarter-end calendar), QQQ_PAIRS / PAIR_ZSCORE (pair-trading lab, REJECT OOS), NEWS_SENTIMENT (newsletter prep data), MULTI_STRATEGY / META_SCREENER (aggregators, superseded by Best Trades), plus journal / portfolio / content tabs. Macro composites (BTFD index, COT, Kerberos PCR) live on the cockpit and macro pages.
Generated by build_screeners_deep.py · sources: signal_archive, whale_13f, openinsider, hrhr_ranked, options_flow_shortlist, emergence_history, sector_acceleration/laggards
Data confidence scale = a discretionary sizing guide (full / half / starter), never a permission verdict · stats from screener_validity + block-bootstrap v12
Sparklines = ~6 months daily close · AI reads regenerate at the EOD build, page refreshes hourly during US market hours
